name: Seyi Table Lamp - 18 Inch Height - TBL4480 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the SEYI 19 inch iron table lamp. Crafted with a sleek black iron finish, this lamp blends seamlessly into any decor. Its minimalist design and robust structure add a touch of elegance to your desk or bedside. The lamp provides a cozy, warm glow, perfect for reading or creating an inviting ambiance. The SEYI lamp is as functional as it is stylish, offering simplicity and sophistication in one neat package. This versatile piece sits comfortably on any surface, offering you both comfort and style whenever and wherever you need it. The SEYI 19 inch iron table lamp in black offers a simple yet modern aesthetic that complements diverse interiors, enhancing your room with a subtle yet effective presence.
